steps.title: Use the clarifying phrase
steps.content: The phrase after the dash explains the blank: the researchers want to see whether age and sex are associated with considerable variations in venom potency. The missing word must describe an effect that is large or significant.

steps.title: Match the magnitude
steps.content: Choice A describes something unsettling, Choice B describes something acceptable, and Choice C means too small to notice, which contradicts considerable. The word that means large or important matches the idea of notable variation in venom potency. The answer is D.
